headline: Malta first-baseline rotation assessment. EU member state, ~520,000 population, established-band composite. No active news in May 2026 recency window. Stable parliamentary democracy with EU framework integration. 2017 Caruana Galizia investigation case continued public-interest implications (sustained baseline). LGBTQI+ rights leadership in EU rankings. Math-hygiene flag: published composite 63.9 cannot reconstruct from current dimension means (reconstructed 60.9). Recommend confirm + math-hygiene flag.
